items.title: Version agreement gate
items.summary: README, install docs, root package, create-workframe package, tags, and npm publish must agree.
acceptance: Single version string across README, docs/public/install.md, both package.json files

items.title: PackageTruthGate from packed tarball
items.summary: Prove wipe → create-workframe → wizard → chat from npm pack artifact, not source optimism.
acceptance: Runs from packed create-workframe tarball in clean temp dir
Fails if UI bundle parity or health checks fail

items.title: Split release evidence model
items.summary: PackageInstallEvidence, FirstRunEvidence, NegativeInstallEvidence — no overloaded first_chat_ok boolean.
acceptance: Docs state evidence is maintainer-release artifact

items.title: Empty-target-only install claim
items.summary: Until CellAuthorityGate exists, public install claim is clean empty target only; deny with no mutation.
acceptance: NegativeInstallEvidence proves no mutation on deny
Public docs scope install claim to empty target

workflow.notes: validateProjectName exists; full evidence runner missing

items.title: Local release gates cannot be skipped silently
items.summary: verify.mjs may skip cursor-local/manual in CI; release sign-off must fail or report blocked when local evidence missing.
acceptance: installer-ui-bundle and dogfood-install-gate tracked in release gate
Release script fails closed when local evidence absent

items.title: Docs-claim gate
items.summary: Public docs must only claim what evidence proves; flag adapter/Electron/public-VPS overclaims.
acceptance: Verifier scans docs/public for unsupported claims

items.title: CellAuthorityGate
items.summary: Manifest provenance, install root ownership, read-only open, mutation plan before update/connect/adopt.

items.title: Mutation-free doctor
items.summary: workframe doctor --json reports Docker/Node/cell/runtime candidates without reading secrets or mutating host.

items.title: RunAuthorityGate
items.summary: Single pre-run decision: actor, profile owner, runtime, provider, credential, payer, delegation, deny reason.
acceptance: Design doc + test cases before implementation
Covers BYOK, trusted-team delegation, company-pays, user_only no fallback

items.title: SurfaceContractGate
items.summary: Agent rail, chat, files, browser, activity need contracts: reads, writes, authority gate, evidence emitted.
acceptance: Each surface linked to harness scenario or manual evidence

items.title: Supervisor negative tests
items.summary: Public mode cannot reach docker.sock from API; supervisor rejects profile/path misuse; update/connect require authority.
acceptance: Public compose verify includes supervisor constraints

items.title: UI and package parity identity
items.summary: Generated install exposes build/package identity so PackageInstallEvidence can assert bundled UI parity.
acceptance: UI and/or API expose package-version or build stamp
PackageTruthGate asserts match to packed version

items.title: AgentIdentity vs HermesRuntimeState seam
items.summary: Separate Workframe agent identity from Hermes profile implementation.
acceptance: Schema or model separates agent_id from runtime profile slug

items.title: RuntimeBinding candidate model
items.summary: Host Hermes, Codex, Claude CLI, Cursor, etc. as inert detected candidates — no execution until harness proves receipt.
acceptance: Candidate registry in doctor or API meta
Detection-only default; no adopt without authority

items.title: Second runtime adapter harness
items.summary: One non-Hermes adapter end-to-end before expanding runtime matrix claims.

items.title: Funding modes beyond BYOK
items.summary: Company-pays and hybrid with visible payer, no user_only fallback, receipt evidence.
acceptance: Billing line items on run_line_items table

workflow.notes: BYOK/company-pays UI exists; run-level receipt missing

items.title: Public and VPS hardening evidence
items.summary: Domain, HTTPS, SMTP, invite-only, backup/restore, secure-mode evidence before marketing public mode.

items.title: Release evidence JSON schema
items.summary: package-truth-gate.schema.json + example fixture.
acceptance: Schema and example committed under operations/release-evidence/

items.title: Negative install evidence runner
items.summary: Non-empty target, unsafe names, arbitrary dir deny, missing Docker — mutation hash before/after.
acceptance: Temp dir only, no host side effects

items.title: First-run evidence runner
items.summary: Docker boot, health, wizard, BYOK path, first chat, minimal session/receipt evidence.

items.title: Package install evidence runner
items.summary: pack → clean install → assert files, version, UI identity.

items.title: Version agreement verifier script
items.summary: CI checks root package, installer package, README, install.md alignment.

items.title: Egress doctrine in public security docs
items.summary: Two traffic classes; credential broker unavoidable in public_multi_user.

items.title: Public deploy egress posture reporting
items.summary: verify-public-deploy.sh reports gateway egress; fails on control-net miswire.

items.title: WORKFRAME_FORCE_AGENT_EGRESS_BROKER enforcement
items.summary: Network-level forced broker for public_multi_user — deny direct provider egress from gateway.
acceptance: Compose/network policy blocks direct provider hosts from gateway
General internet for non-credential traffic preserved
verify passes when flag true and enforcement active

workflow.notes: Verify fails if flag set today — intentional until built

items.title: Provider-neutral credential broker layer
items.summary: Extract lease validation and authorization from llm_proxy.py for reuse by action_proxy and future brokers.
acceptance: llm_proxy and action_proxy use shared validation
No behavior regression in LLM path

items.title: Structured broker audit events
items.summary: Timestamped attributable events for brokered requests (user, workspace, profile, run, provider, host, status, deny reason).
acceptance: Events persisted or logged in structured form

items.title: Lease validation test matrix
items.summary: Tests for expired, revoked, provider/profile mismatch, missing proxy token/header.
acceptance: test_* or harness scenarios cover all rejection cases

items.title: Generalize tool brokers beyond LLM
items.summary: GitHub, messaging, deploy, MCP — same lease+broker pattern as LLM proxy.
acceptance: At least one non-LLM broker with lease injection

items.title: Optional Agent Vault backend spike
items.summary: Sidecar integration only after native egress invariant is enforced and tested.
acceptance: Spike doc or branch; no hard dependency on external vault

items.title: Vocabulary lock (Cell, Run, Lease, …)
items.summary: Consistent terms across docs and code; stop using Hermes profile as catch-all for agent/runtime/authority.

items.title: Harden current Hermes stack
items.summary: Supervisor-only Docker socket, LLM proxy + wf_rt leases, no raw keys in profile .env for turns.
acceptance: API cannot access Docker socket in SECURE_MODE
All model usage through proxy and leases

workflow.notes: Core path shipped; negative tests incomplete (WF-011)

items.title: Workframe-owned runs and run_events tables
items.summary: Minimum run ledger schema; DM, mention, card, cron, slash, webhook create runs.

items.title: Tool and credential broker generalization
items.summary: LLM proxy pattern → git, messaging, deploy, Google, MCP brokers.

items.title: Runtime and engine adapter seam
items.summary: EngineAdapter + RuntimeAdapter protocols; Hermes first implementation.

items.title: Run-scoped file manifests
items.summary: Move from broad workspace mounts to copy-in/run workspace/promote-out with ledger file diff.

items.title: Workframe Cell productization
items.summary: cell_id metadata, install/upgrade/backup/health/domain tooling.

items.title: Provisioned and BYOC control plane
items.summary: Cloud manager for VPS cells, licensing, billing, template install, support bundle.

items.title: Marketplace and payment rails
items.summary: Agent/skill/playbook marketplace after runs and billing stable.

items.title: Adopt spec-kit workflow mapping
items.summary: Map constitution/spec/plan/tasks/implement to ledger + .harness without duplicating AGENTS.md.
acceptance: Optional vendor/spec-kit submodule or specify init
P0 items have spec stubs under docs/ledger/specs/
